ddls:
CREATE TABLE "equipment" (
  "equipment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each equipment */,
  "equipment_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the equipment type */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location where the equipment is installed */,
  "criticality_id" INTEGER /* ID of the criticality level of the equipment */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date when the equipment was installed */,
  "last_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the last maintenance activity */,
  "next_maintenance_due" TEXT /* Date when the next maintenance is due */,
  "operational_status" TEXT /* Current operational status of the equipment */,
  "warranty_expiration" TEXT /* Date when the warranty for the equipment expires */,
  "vendor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vendor who supplied the equipment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("equipment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_equipment_equipment_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("equipment_type_id") REFERENCES equipment_types ("equipment_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_equipment_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_equipment_criticality_id FOREIGN KEY ("criticality_id") REFERENCES criticalities ("criticality_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "equipment_types" (
  "equipment_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each equipment type */,
  "equipment_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the equipment type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the equipment type */,
  "average_lifespan" INTEGER /* Average lifespan of the equipment type */,
  "maintenance_frequency" TEXT /* Recommended frequency for maintenance activities */,
  "standard_operating_temperature" TEXT /* Standard operating temperature range for the equipment */,
  "standard_operating_pressure" TEXT /* Standard operating pressure range for the equipment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("equipment_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the location */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Geographic latitude of the location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Geographic longitude of the location */,
  "contact_person" TEXT /* Name of the contact person for the location */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "criticalities" (
  "criticality_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each criticality level */,
  "criticality_name" TEXT /* Name of the criticality level */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the criticality level */,
  "maintenance_priority" INTEGER /* Priority level for maintenance activities */,
  "alert_threshold" REAL /* Threshold for generating alerts */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("criticality_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sensors" (
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sensor */,
  "equipment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the equipment the sensor is attached to */,
  "sensor_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sensor type */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date when the sensor was installed */,
  "last_calibration_date" TEXT /* Date of the last calibration */,
  "next_calibration_due" TEXT /* Date when the next calibration is due */,
  "sensor_status" TEXT /* Current status of the sensor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sensor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensors_equipment_id FOREIGN KEY ("equipment_id") REFERENCES equipment ("equipment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensors_sensor_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_type_id") REFERENCES sensor_types ("sensor_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sensor_types" (
  "sensor_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sensor type */,
  "sensor_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the sensor type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the sensor type */,
  "calibration_frequency" TEXT /* Recommended frequency for calibration */,
  "data_collection_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency at which data is collected */,
  "measurement_unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for sensor readings */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sensor_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "readings" (
  "reading_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reading */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sensor that took the reading */,
  "reading_value" REAL /* Value of the reading */,
  "reading_time" TEXT /* Time the reading was taken */,
  "sensor_status_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sensor status at the time of the reading */,
  "maintenance_id" INTEGER /* ID of the maintenance activity if the reading was taken during maintenance */,
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* ID of the alert generated by the reading */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reading_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_readings_maintenance_id FOREIGN KEY ("maintenance_id") REFERENCES maintenance ("maintenance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_readings_sensor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_id") REFERENCES sensors ("sensor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_readings_alert_id FOREIGN KEY ("alert_id") REFERENCES alerts ("alert_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "predictions" (
  "prediction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each prediction */,
  "equipment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the equipment the prediction is for */,
  "prediction_value" REAL /* Value of the prediction */,
  "prediction_time" TEXT /* Time the prediction was made */,
  "model_version" TEXT /* Version of the predictive model used */,
  "confidence_score" REAL /* Confidence score of the prediction */,
  "predicted_failure_time" TEXT /* Predicted time of equipment failure */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prediction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_predictions_equipment_id FOREIGN KEY ("equipment_id") REFERENCES equipment ("equipment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "maintenance" (
  "maintenance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each maintenance activity */,
  "equipment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the equipment the maintenance was performed on */,
  "maintenance_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the maintenance type */,
  "maintenance_time" TEXT /* Time the maintenance was performed */,
  "duration" TEXT /* Duration of the maintenance activity */,
  "cost" REAL /* Cost incurred for the maintenance activity */,
  "maintenance_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the maintenance activity */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the maintenance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("maintenance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_maintenance_maintenance_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("maintenance_type_id") REFERENCES maintenance_types ("maintenance_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_maintenance_equipment_id FOREIGN KEY ("equipment_id") REFERENCES equipment ("equipment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_maintenance_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "maintenance_types" (
  "maintenance_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each maintenance type */,
  "maintenance_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the maintenance type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the maintenance type */,
  "estimated_duration" TEXT /* Estimated duration for the maintenance type */,
  "average_cost" REAL /* Average cost for the maintenance type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("maintenance_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "equipment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the equipment the alert is for */,
  "alert_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the alert type */,
  "alert_time" TEXT /* Time the alert was generated */,
  "alert_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the alert */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated or acknowledged the alert */,
  "alert_status" TEXT /* Current status of the alert */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_alert_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("alert_type_id") REFERENCES alert_types ("alert_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_equipment_id FOREIGN KEY ("equipment_id") REFERENCES equipment ("equipment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alert_types" (
  "alert_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert type */,
  "alert_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the alert type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the alert type */,
  "alert_threshold" REAL /* Threshold for generating the alert type */,
  "alert_severity" TEXT /* Severity level of the alert type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., maintenance personnel, data analyst) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "account_status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (e.g., active, disabled) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Time the user accessed the system */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the user accessed the system */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to access the system */,
  "session_duration" TEXT /* Duration of the user's session */,
  "activity_summary" TEXT /* Summary of the user's activities during the session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
